text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... My legs... are so heavy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm sure there's a proverb for times like this...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no. I can't come up with anything...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the races she's been running must be wearing
down on Sakura Chiyono O. It might be a good
idea to revise her race schedule.
